name: SQL Injection: Login Bypass
description: A login form builds its SQL query using string formatting. Exploit it to access the admin panel, then capture the flag.

hint_tiers.text: Look closely at how user input reaches the SQL query. What happens if the input contains a single quote?
This is called SQL injection. The query uses f-string formatting, so your input becomes part of the SQL. Try crafting input that changes the query's logic.
Try entering ' OR '1'='1 as the username. This makes the WHERE clause always true, logging you in as the first user (admin).
